mnemonics: BLOCK-TEST: Blocks Linked On Chain Keep Transactions Examined Securely & Trustworthily
keyPoints: Testing ensures the integrity and security of the blockchain.
Common tests include unit, integration, and performance testing.
Smart contract testing is critical to prevent vulnerabilities and financial loss.
commonMistakes: Assuming code is secure without thorough testing, especially for smart contracts.
Neglecting to test for network latency and scalability under load.
Focusing only on functionality and ignoring edge cases and attack vectors like reentrancy.
